tasks.label: Start SeedDetect emulator
tasks.command: $adb='C:\Android\Sdk\platform-tools\adb.exe'; $serial='emulator-5554'; $hasDevice = (& $adb devices | Select-String $serial); if (-not $hasDevice) { Start-Process 'C:\Android\Sdk\emulator\emulator.exe' -ArgumentList '-avd SeedDetect_API34 -netdelay none -netspeed full -no-snapshot-load' | Out-Null }; & $adb -s $serial wait-for-device | Out-Null; $boot=''; for ($i=0; $i -lt 120; $i++) { $boot = (& $adb -s $serial shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>$null).Trim(); if ($boot -eq '1') { break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 }; if ($boot -ne '1') { throw 'Emulator boot timeout (sys.boot_completed != 1)' }; & $adb -s $serial shell input keyevent 82 | Out-Null; & $adb -s $serial shell am force-stop com.google.android.documentsui 2>$null; & $adb -s $serial shell am force-stop com.android.documentsui 2>$null; & $adb -s $serial shell am start -a android.intent.action.MAIN -c android.intent.category.HOME | Out-Null

tasks.label: Build SeedDetect release APK (phone)
tasks.command: $flutter='C:\Users\Artem Melentyev\source\flutter\bin\flutter.bat'; $env:ANDROID_HOME='C:\Android\Sdk'; $env:ANDROID_SDK_ROOT='C:\Android\Sdk'; $env:JAVA_HOME='C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-17.0.18.8-hotspot'; & $flutter clean; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; & $flutter pub get; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; & $flutter build apk --release --target-platform android-arm64
